entries.note: V58-B reuses the shipped V58-A live-turn admission, handoff, and reintegration surfaces by default.
V58-B adds one explicit live restoration handoff and reintegration path; restoration is explicit harness state, not hidden cleanup.
V58-B requires same-session and same-turn restoration continuation plus restoration-time capability and approval resnapshot before reintegration may be declared.
The original ticket and prior reintegration refs remain historical lineage inputs only and do not by themselves mint restoration entitlement.
Replay remains bounded recomputation and re-evaluation of the exact restoration event only, with replay-law proof embedded in the V58-B reintegration report.
